common.vision: Unite Solana users through Bonk identity humor loyalty and community competition

equilibrium.vision: Balance meme energy with utility that keeps Bonk relevant beyond a single cycle

guide.vision: Guide Solana meme communities through an integrated token used across apps and launches

success.vision: Outcompete rival meme coins by becoming the default social token of Solana

vow.vision: Keep Bonk the social layer meme coin that rallies Solana culture through shared play
